heading: Commercial driver’s license requirement
label: 31302 Commercial driver’s license requirement
text: No individual shall operate a commercial motor vehicle without a valid commercial driver’s license issued in accordance with section 31308. An individual operating a commercial motor vehicle may have only one driver’s license at any time and may have only one learner’s permit at any time.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3130249 App.:2701., , .Oct. 27, 1986Pub. L. 99–570, § 12002100 Stat. 3207–170The words “Effective ” are omitted as executed. The words after “issued a driver’s license” are omitted as expired.July 1, 1987

Amendments2005— inserted “and may have only one learner’s permit at any time” before period at end.Pub. L. 109–591998— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “An individual operating a commercial motor vehicle may have only one driver’s license at any time, except during the 10-day period beginning on the date the individual is issued a driver’s license.”Pub. L. 105–178
